text:
is a fictional character from P Godzilla vs. Evangelion ~G Cell Awakening~ pachinko game. 

__TOC__

Profile

Rei Ayanami, whose body is taken over by King Ghidorah's aura and rejects everything, including Angels, Evangelions, humans and Godzilla. 

She is able to fly using her six wings. She has a destructive explosive power capable of incinerating powerful beings such as the Fourth Angel.

Appearance

Ghidorah Rei has short pale blue hair with bangs centered to the middle and has deep red eyes. When she was taken over, she was using her normal plugsuit, after being taken over, her plugsuit turned black with purple details. She has veins all over her plugsuit, she has golden details in her body.

In her second appearance she retains Rei's white plugsuit with exception of the golden details much like last time.

History

P Godzilla vs. Evangelion ~G Cell Awakening~

PACHINKO GODZILLA vs. EVANGELION: Second Impact G
